zakatNoteText: This calculator uses the silver Nisab (595g) which is lower, in the interest of the poor as per majority of scholars. The fixed Zakat rate is 2.5% of total wealth that has reached Nisab and has been held for one full year.

readQuranPage: Read a page from the Quran
duaSleep1: In Your name, O Allah, I die and I live
duaSleep2: O Allah, protect me from Your punishment on the Day You resurrect Your servants
duaSleep3: In Your name, my Lord, I lay my side down, and by You I raise it. If You take my soul, have mercy on it, and if You release it, protect it as You protect Your righteous servants
duaSleep4: O Allah, You created my soul and You take it back. To You belongs its death and its life. If You give it life, protect it, and if You cause it to die, forgive it. O Allah, I ask You for well-being
duaSleep5: O Allah, Lord of the heavens and Lord of the earth and Lord of the Mighty Throne, our Lord and Lord of all things, Splitter of grain and seeds, Revealer of the Torah, the Gospel and the Quran, I seek refuge in You from the evil of everything whose forelock is in Your Hand
duaWudu2: I bear witness that there is no god but Allah alone, with no partner, and I bear witness that Muhammad is His servant and Messenger
duaWudu3: O Allah, make me among those who repent and make me among those who purify themselves
duaWudu4: Glory be to You, O Allah, and praise be to You. I bear witness that there is no god but You, I seek Your forgiveness and repent to You
duaMosque1: O Allah, open for me the gates of Your mercy
duaMosque2: I seek refuge in Allah the Almighty, and in His Noble Face, and in His eternal authority, from the accursed Satan
duaMosque3: In the name of Allah, and prayers and peace be upon the Messenger of Allah. O Allah, forgive me my sins and open for me the gates of Your mercy
duaSalah1: Glory be to You, O Allah, and praise be to You. Blessed is Your name, exalted is Your majesty, and there is no god but You
duaSalah2: Our Lord, give us good in this world and good in the Hereafter, and protect us from the punishment of the Fire
duaSalah3: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the punishment of the grave, from the punishment of Hellfire, from the trials of life and death, and from the evil of the trial of the Antichrist
duaSalah4: My Lord, make me and my offspring those who establish prayer. Our Lord, accept my supplication
duaHome1: In the name of Allah we enter, in the name of Allah we leave, and upon Allah our Lord we rely
duaHome2: O Allah, I ask You for the good of entering and the good of leaving. In the name of Allah we enter and in the name of Allah we leave, and upon Allah our Lord we rely
duaClothes1: All praise is for Allah who has clothed me with this garment and provided it for me without any power or strength from me
duaClothes2: O Allah, I ask You for its good and the good it was made for, and I seek refuge from its evil and the evil it was made for
duaTravel1: Glory be to Him who has subjected this to us, and we could not have done it ourselves. And to our Lord we shall surely return
duaTravel2: O Allah, we ask You for righteousness and piety in this journey, and we ask You for deeds that please You. O Allah, make this journey easy for us and fold its distance. O Allah, You are the Companion on the journey and the Guardian of the family
duaTravel3: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the hardships of travel, from the sorrows of return, from the scene of decline after prosperity, from the supplication of the oppressed, and from seeing evil befall family and property
duaFood2: In the name of Allah, at its beginning and at its end
duaFood3: All praise is for Allah who has fed us, given us drink, and made us Muslims
duaFood4: All praise is for Allah who has fed me this food and provided it for me without any power or strength from me
duaDhikr4: There is no god but Allah alone, with no partner. To Him belongs sovereignty and praise, and He has power over all things
duaRevival2: O Controller of hearts, make my heart steadfast upon Your religion
duaRevival3: O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge, good provision, and accepted deeds
duaRevival4: O Allah, I ask You for guidance, piety, chastity, and self-sufficiency
duaAfterPrayer1: I seek forgiveness from Allah, I seek forgiveness from Allah, I seek forgiveness from Allah.
duaAfterPrayer2: O Allah, You are Peace and from You comes peace. Blessed are You, O Possessor of majesty and honor.
duaAfterPrayer3: Glory be to Allah (33) and praise be to Allah (33) and Allah is the Greatest (33).
duaAfterPrayer4: There is no deity except Allah, alone, He has no partner, His is the dominion and His is the praise, and He is over all things competent.
duaAfterPrayer5: O Allah, help me in remembering You, in giving You thanks, and in worshiping You in the best manner.
duaRizq1: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from anxiety and grief, from weakness and laziness, from cowardice and miserliness, from being overwhelmed by debt and overpowered by men
duaRizq2: O Allah, suffice me with what is lawful against what is unlawful, and enrich me by Your favor against all others
duaRizq3: O Allah, Lord of the seven heavens, Lord of the Mighty Throne, be sufficient for me against everything, provide for me from where I expect not, O Allah, provide us with what is good
duaKnowledge1: O Allah, benefit me with what You have taught me, teach me what will benefit me, and increase me in knowledge
duaKnowledge2: My Lord, increase me in knowledge
duaKnowledge3: O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge, good provision, and accepted deeds
duaFaith1: O Allah, I ask You for steadfastness in my affairs, and determination in guidance. I ask You for gratitude for Your blessings and good worship of You
duaFaith2: O Allah, make faith beloved to us and beautify it in our hearts, and make disbelief, wickedness, and disobedience hateful to us. Make us among the rightly guided
duaFaith3: Our Lord, do not let our hearts deviate after You have guided us and grant us mercy from You. Indeed, You are the Bestower.
duaJudgment1: O Allah, I ask You for Paradise and what brings me closer to it of words and deeds, and I seek refuge in You from the Fire and what brings me closer to it of words and deeds
duaJudgment2: O Allah, make my accounting easy
duaJudgment3: O Allah, save me from the fire.
duaForgiveness1: O Allah, You are my Lord, there is no god but You. You created me and I am Your servant. I am upon Your covenant and promise as best I can. I seek refuge in You from the evil of what I have done. I acknowledge Your blessings upon me and I acknowledge my sins. So forgive me, for none forgives sins except You
duaForgiveness2: Our Lord, we have wronged ourselves, and if You do not forgive us and have mercy on us, we will surely be among the losers
duaForgiveness3: I seek forgiveness from Allah the Almighty, there is no god but He, the Living, the Self-Sustaining, and I repent to Him
duaPraising1: Glory be to Allah and praise be to Him, as many times as the number of His creation, to the extent of His pleasure, to the weight of His Throne, and to the extent of the ink of His words
duaPraising2: There is no god but Allah alone, with no partner. To Him belongs sovereignty and praise. He gives life and causes death, and He has power over all things
duaPraising3: Glory be to Allah by the number of His creations, Glory be to Allah as much as pleases Himself, Glory be to Allah by the weight of His throne, Glory be to Allah by the ink of His words.
duaFamily1: Our Lord, grant us from among our spouses and offspring comfort to our eyes and make us leaders of the righteous
duaFamily2: My Lord, make me grateful for Your favor which You have bestowed upon me and upon my parents, and to do righteousness of which You approve
duaFamily3: O Allah, put love between our hearts and reconcile between us
duaHealth1: O Allah, Lord of mankind, remove the illness. Cure, for You are the Healer. There is no cure except Your cure, a cure that leaves no sickness
duaHealth2: In the name of Allah, I place my trust in Allah. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from going astray or being led astray, from slipping or being caused to slip, from wronging or being wronged, from behaving ignorantly or being treated ignorantly
duaHealth3: In the name of Allah, I ruqya you from everything that harms you, from the evil of every soul or envious eye. May Allah heal you.
duaLoss1: To Allah we belong and to Him we shall return. O Allah, reward me for my affliction and replace it with something better
duaLoss2: Indeed, to Allah belongs what He has taken, and to Him belongs what He has given. Everything has an appointed time with Him, so be patient and seek reward from Allah
duaLoss3: O Allah, there is no ease except what You make easy, and You make the difficult easy if You wish.
duaSadness1: O Allah, I am Your servant, the son of Your servant, the son of Your female servant. My forelock is in Your hand. Your command concerning me prevails, and Your decree concerning me is just. I ask You by every name that belongs to You, with which You named Yourself, or revealed in Your Book, or taught to any of Your creation, or kept in the knowledge of the unseen with You, to make the Quran the spring of my heart, the light of my chest, the departure of my sadness, and the relief of my anxiety
duaSadness2: There is no god but You. Glory be to You, indeed I have been among the wrongdoers
duaSadness3: Allah is sufficient for us, and He is the Best Trustee.
duaPatience1: O Allah, there is no ease except what You have made easy, and You make difficulty easy if You wish
duaPatience2: Allah is sufficient for us, and He is the best Disposer of affairs
duaDebt1: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from anxiety and grief, from weakness and laziness, from cowardice and miserliness, from being overwhelmed by debt and overpowered by men
duaMens1: Glory be to Allah and all praise is due to Him.
duaMens2: I seek forgiveness from Allah and repent to Him.
duaMens3: There is no deity except Allah, alone, He has no partner.
duaDeceased1: O Allah, forgive them and have mercy on them, grant them well-being and pardon them. Honor their abode and make their entrance wide, wash them with water, snow, and ice, and purify them from sins as a white garment is purified from filth
duaDeceased2: O Allah, forgive our living and our dead, those present and those absent, our young and our old, our males and our females
duaDeceased3: O Allah, do not deprive us of his reward and do not test us after him, and forgive us and him.
duaHajj1: Here I am, O Allah, here I am. Here I am, You have no partner, here I am. Indeed, all praise, grace, and sovereignty belong to You. You have no partner
duaHajj2: O Allah, this is Your House which You have made sacred. So make my visit righteous, my pilgrimage accepted, and my sins forgiven
duaHajj3: In the name of Allah and Allah is the Greatest.
duaRamadan1: O Allah, You are Forgiving, You love forgiveness, so forgive me
duaRamadan2: O Allah, I fasted for You, and with Your provision I break my fast. The thirst has gone, the veins are moistened, and the reward is established, if Allah wills
duaRamadan3: O Allah, I have observed the fast for You and upon Your provision I have broken my fast.
duaNature1: O Allah, make it a beneficial rain
duaNature2: O Allah, around us and not upon us. O Allah, upon the hills, mountains, valleys, and places where trees grow
duaNature3: O Allah, I ask You for its good and the good of what is in it and the good of what You have sent with it, and I seek refuge with You from its evil and the evil in it and the evil of what You have sent with it.
duaManners1: O Allah, guide me to the best of manners, none can guide to the best of them but You, and turn away from me the worst of them, none can turn away from me the worst of them but You.
duaManners2: O Allah, I seek refuge with You from reprehensible manners, deeds, and desires.
duaGuidance1: O Allah, I seek Your guidance through Your knowledge, and I seek Your ability through Your power, and I ask You from Your immense favor. You have power while I have none. You know while I do not, and You are the Knower of the unseen
duaGuidance2: O Allah, show me the truth as truth and grant me the ability to follow it, and show me falsehood as falsehood and grant me the ability to avoid it
duaGuidance3: O Allah, choose for me and select the best for me.
duaSleepBefore6: O Allah, I have submitted my soul to You, entrusted my affairs to You, turned my face to You, and laid my back to You, out of desire and fear of You. There is no refuge and no escape from You except to You. I believe in Your Book which You have revealed and in Your Prophet whom You have sent
duaWakeUp1: All praise is for Allah who gave us life after having caused us to die, and unto Him is the resurrection
duaWakeUp2: There is no god but Allah alone, with no partner. To Him belongs sovereignty and praise, and He has power over all things. Glory be to Allah, praise be to Allah, there is no god but Allah, Allah is the Greatest, and there is no might or power except with Allah, the Most High, the Most Great
duaNightmare1: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from His anger and punishment, from the evil of His servants, and from the whispers of the devils and from their presence
duaNightmare2: I seek refuge in Allah from the accursed Satan
duaMosqueLeave1: In the name of Allah and peace and blessings be upon the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, I ask You of Your grace.
duaMosqueLeave2: O Allah, protect me from the accursed devil.
duaHomeLeave1: In the name of Allah, I have placed my trust in Allah, there is no might and no power but with Allah.
duaHomeLeave2: O Allah, I seek refuge with You lest I stray or be led astray, slip or be caused to slip, oppress or be oppressed, or behave foolishly or be treated foolishly.
duaClothesSee1: May it wear out, and Allah replace it with something better
duaClothesSee2: Wear new clothes, live a praiseworthy life, and die a martyr
duaTravelReturn1: Returning, repenting, worshipping, and to our Lord we are thankful
duaTravelReturn2: O Allah, I ask You for the good of entering and the good of exiting
duaVehicle1: Glory to Him who has subjected this to us, and we could not have [otherwise] subdued it, and indeed, to our Lord, we will return
duaVehicle2: In the name of Allah, all praises are for Allah
duaFoodBefore2: O Allah, bless us in what You have provided us and protect us from the punishment of the fire
duaFoodBefore3: In the name of Allah, from its beginning to its end
duaDrink1: O Allah, bless us in it and increase it for us
duaGuestFood1: O Allah, bless them in what You have provided them, forgive them and have mercy on them
duaGuestFood2: May the fasting people break their fast with you, and may the righteous eat your food, and may the angels pray for you
duaMorning1: O Allah, grant health to my body, O Allah, grant health to my hearing, O Allah, grant health to my sight, there is no deity except You
duaEvening1: We have entered the evening and the kingdom belongs to Allah, and all praises are for Allah. There is no deity except Allah, alone, without partner
duaEvening2: O Allah, with Your will we enter the evening, with Your will we enter the morning, with Your will we live and with Your will we die, and to You is our return
duaEvening3: O Allah, whatever favor has come to me, or any of Your creation, it is from You alone, without partner, so for You is all praise and all thanks
duaProtection1: In the name of Allah, with whose name nothing in the earth or heaven can harm, and He is the All-Hearing, All-Knowing
duaProtection2: Allah is sufficient for me, there is no deity except Him, upon Him I rely, and He is the Lord of the Mighty Throne
duaSalawat1: O Allah, send prayers and peace upon our Prophet Muhammad
duaSalawat2: O Allah, send prayers upon Muhammad and upon the family of Muhammad, as You sent prayers upon Ibrahim and upon the family of Ibrahim, indeed, You are Praiseworthy, Glorious
duaDebt2: O Allah, suffice me with what is lawful against what is unlawful, and enrich me by Your favor against all others
duaExam1: My Lord, expand for me my chest [with assurance], ease for me my task, and untie the knot from my tongue, so they may understand my speech
duaExam2: O Allah, there is nothing easy except what You make easy and You make the difficult easy if You will
duaParents1: My Lord, have mercy upon them as they brought me up [when I was] small
duaParents2: Our Lord, forgive me and my parents and the believers on the Day the account is established
duaSpouse1: O Allah, bless them and bless upon them and unite them in goodness
duaVisitSick1: No harm, it is a purification, if Allah wills.
duaRuqyah1: In the name of Allah (three times), I seek refuge with Allah and His Power from the evil of what I find and apprehend.
duaHappy1: Praise be to Allah through whose blessing good works are completed.
duaHappy2: O Allah, to You belongs all praise as befits Your Majestic Face and Great Sovereignty.
duaCondolence1: Indeed, to Allah belongs what He has taken, and to Him belongs what He has given, and everything with Him has an appointed time. So be patient and seek reward.
duaGrave1: Peace be upon you, dwellers of the graves, from among the believers and the Muslims. Indeed, we, by the will of Allah, are soon to join you. We ask Allah for well-being for us and for you.
duaSai1: Indeed, Safa and Marwah are among the symbols of Allah.
duaSai2: We begin with what Allah has begun with.
duaArafat1: There is no deity except Allah, alone, without partner. To Him belongs sovereignty and praise, and He is over all things competent.
duaSuhoor1: I intend to fast tomorrow for the month of Ramadan.
duaRain1: We have been given rain by the grace and mercy of Allah.

zakatLegalText: This calculator is based on the silver Nisab (595 grams), which is the lower threshold, in favor of the poor according to the majority of scholars. The fixed Zakat rate is 2.5% of total wealth that has reached the Nisab and a full year has passed.
duaAfterSalah1: I seek forgiveness from Allah (three times). O Allah, You are Peace and from You comes peace. Blessed are You, O Possessor of Majesty and Honor
duaAfterSalah2: There is no god but Allah alone, with no partner. To Him belongs sovereignty and praise, and He has power over all things. O Allah, none can prevent what You give, and none can give what You prevent, and the fortune of the fortunate avails not against You
duaAfterSalah3: There is no god but Allah alone, with no partner. To Him belongs sovereignty and praise, and He has power over all things. There is no might or power except with Allah. There is no god but Allah, and we worship none but Him. To Him belongs blessing and grace and beautiful praise. There is no god but Allah, being sincere in religion to Him even though the disbelievers may detest it
duaDhikr6: Glory be to Allah and praise be to Him, Glory be to Allah the Almighty
duaDhikr7: There is no might or power except with Allah
duaDhikr8: O Allah, send prayers upon Muhammad and upon the family of Muhammad
duaPostPrayer1: Glory be to Allah (33 times), All praise is for Allah (33 times), Allah is the Greatest (33 times), then say to complete 100: There is no god but Allah alone with no partner, to Him belongs sovereignty and praise and He has power over all things
duaPostPrayer2: Ayat al-Kursi: Allah - there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Self-Sustaining...
duaMenstruation1: All praise is for Allah in all conditions
duaGoodManners1: O Allah, guide me to the best of manners, for none guides to the best of them except You. And turn away from me bad manners, for none turns them away from me except You
duaGoodManners2: O Allah, I ask You for good health, chastity, trustworthiness, good manners, and contentment with destiny
duaSubtitleBestIstighfar: The Best Form of Seeking Forgiveness
pwaNotifTip: Notifications work even when the app is closed! Install the app as PWA and enable notifications to receive Athan alerts at every prayer time automatically.

namesOfAllahVerse: And to Allah belong the best names, so invoke Him by them

liveDescription: Watch live from the holiest mosques in the world
noStreamsAvailable: No streams available in this category
ruqyahAyatKursiTranslation: Allah - there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of existence. Neither drowsiness overtakes Him nor sleep. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Who is it that can intercede with Him except by His permission? He knows what is before them and what will be after them, and they encompass not a thing of His knowledge except for what He wills. His Throne extends over the heavens and the earth, and their preservation tires Him not. And He is the Most High, the Most Great.
ruqyahFalaqTranslation: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak, from the evil of that which He created, and from the evil of darkness when it settles, and from the evil of the blowers in knots, and from the evil of an envier when he envies.
ruqyahNasTranslation: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind, the Sovereign of mankind, the God of mankind, from the evil of the retreating whisperer, who whispers in the breasts of mankind, from among the jinn and mankind.
ruqyahIkhlasTranslation: Say: He is Allah, the One. Allah, the Eternal Refuge. He neither begets nor is born. Nor is there to Him any equivalent.
ruqyahHomeProtTranslation: In the name of Allah with whose name nothing on earth or in heaven can cause harm, and He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.
learningPathDesc: Complete each level to unlock the next one!
level1Desc: Learn the first 7 Arabic letters (Alif to Kha)
level4Desc: Learn the final letters 22-28 (Kaf to Ya)
level5Desc: Learn essential Quranic vocabulary and meanings
buildSentenceHint: Tap words in the correct order
ourMissionText: We aim to provide a comprehensive digital Islamic experience that combines modern technology with authentic Islamic values. We strive to serve Muslims around the world with tools that help them in their worship and religious learning, with full commitment to privacy and data protection.
feat_prayer: Accurate prayer times with Azan notifications
contactText: Have a question or suggestion? We would love to hear from you.
madeWithLove: Made with love for the Muslim Ummah
ourTeamText: This app was developed with love and dedication to serve the Islamic community. We continuously work on improving the app and adding new features.
termsIntroText: By using the "Azan & Hikaya" app, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to any part of these terms, please do not use the app.
termsServiceText: "Azan & Hikaya" is a free Islamic app providing prayer times, Holy Quran, duas and adhkar, Islamic stories, Ruqyah, and other Islamic tools. The app is available on the web as a Progressive Web App (PWA).
termsAccount1: You must provide accurate information when creating an account
termsAccount2: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and password
termsAccount3: You must be at least 16 years old to create an account (per GDPR)
termsAccount4: You have the right to delete your account at any time
termsUGC1: You are responsible for content you publish (stories and comments)
termsUGC2: Content must be Islamic, appropriate, and not violate Islamic principles

periodNote1: Prayer is not made up after menstruation — fully exempt
periodNote2: Fasting must be made up after Ramadan
periodNote3: Reading Quran from phone or memorization without touching Mushaf is permissible
periodNote4: Ghusl is obligatory after menstruation before resuming prayer
periodNote5: When in doubt about purity, wait until you are completely sure
periodDuasIntro: Duas and adhkar that can be read during menstruation
iftarDuaText: O Allah, I fasted for You and with Your provision I break my fast
guardPrayers: Guard the prayers and the middle prayer and stand before Allah in devotion
duaTranslationAyatKursi: Allah! There is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of existence. Neither drowsiness overtakes Him nor sleep. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth.
duaTranslationAnxiety: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from anxiety and grief, from weakness and laziness, from miserliness and cowardice, from the burden of debts and from being overpowered by men.
duaTranslationSayyidIstighfar: O Allah, You are my Lord, none has the right to be worshipped except You, You created me and I am Your servant, and I am faithful to my covenant and my promise as much as I can.
duaTranslationRizq: O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge, good provision, and accepted deeds.
duaTranslationEnterMosque: O Allah, open for me the doors of Your mercy.
duaTranslationTawakkul: In the name of Allah, I place my trust in Allah, and there is no might nor power except with Allah.
duaTranslationHealing: O Allah, Lord of the people, remove the affliction. Heal, for You are the Healer. There is no cure except Your cure - a cure that leaves no illness behind.
notAdminAccount: This account is not an admin

seoHome: Athan & Hikaya - Your Islamic Companion | Prayer Times, Quran, Duas
seoHomeDesc: Download the best Islamic app. Prayer times, Quran, Duas, Tasbeeh, Qibla direction, Islamic stories and more.
seoPrayerTimesDesc: Get accurate prayer times for your location. Athan alerts, prayer tracking, and Islamic calendar.

seoTasbeehDesc: Digital tasbeeh counter. SubhanAllah, Alhamdulillah, Allahu Akbar. Count and save your dhikr.
seoZakat: Zakat Calculator - Calculate Your Zakat Accurately

seoMosque: Nearby Mosque Times - Prayer Times at Your Mosque
seoMosqueDesc: Find prayer times at nearby mosques. Live mosque prayer establishment times.
seoStoriesDesc: Inspiring Islamic stories and lessons from the Quran and Sunnah. Share your stories with the community.
seoDuas: Islamic Duas - Fortress of the Muslim
seoDuasDesc: A comprehensive collection of Islamic duas from the Quran and Sunnah. Morning/evening adhkar and more.
seoQiblaDesc: Find the Qibla direction from your location using compass and map.
seoRuqyahDesc: Ruqyah Ash-Shariah from Quran and authentic Sunnah for protection and healing.
